content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_ECM_EW_Cost
    as

-- drop view v_ECM_EW_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost WBM]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT          Distinct 'Countertop' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' as Company
,               CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID]
,               C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,               CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,               CO.ID as [Order ID]
,               COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Date]
,               P.USER_1 as [Brand]
,				PR.DESCRIPTION as [Product Category]
,               P.ID as [Part ID] 
,               P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description]
,               P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID]
,               COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt]
,               COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty]
--,               CPC.COST*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost]
--,				(UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)*COL.ORDER_QTY as [Cost Visual]
FROM            ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
JOIN            ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
JOIN            ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
JOIN		    ECM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PRODUCT PR on P.PRODUCT_CODE = PR.CODE
LEFT JOIN		ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
--LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
AND             C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND             COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED > 0
AND				P.USER_1 IN ('YONANAS', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('WESTBEND') AND PS.SITE_ID = '20'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('VINTURI') AND PS.SITE_ID = '30'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('YONANAS') AND PS.SITE_ID = '40'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('YONANAS', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('WESTBEND') AND PS.SITE_ID = '20'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('VINTURI') AND PS.SITE_ID = '30'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'Edgecraft' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('YONANAS') AND PS.SITE_ID = '40'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555006', 'V555006', 'Y555006')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date
